{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = diamond (The Traveler's Gate Trilogy)
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Indirial]] can call upon diamond to clarify the world and lift the weight on his thoughts.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19">''City of Light'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
